mapper.select:
SELECT siteCode, activityNo, activityName, activityTemplate, staticDate, sum(sendMemberNum) as sendMemberNum, sum(totalAmount) as totalAmount, sum(acquireWheelNum) as acquireWheelNum, sum(acquireSpinWheelNum) as acquireSpinWheelNum, sum(eventMemberNum) as eventMemberNum, sum(recvMemberNum) as recvMemberNum, sum(recvAmount) as recvAmount from (
) as t group by siteCode,activityNo,activityName,staticDate order by staticDate desc
